Class Category

java.lang.Object
Transaction.Category
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Category extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a category for grouping transactions.

A category can be either a system default or a user-defined custom category. Implements Serializable for data persistence.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Category

      public Category()
      Constructs an empty Category.

    • Category

      public Category(String name, boolean isCustom)
      Constructs a new Category with a specific name.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the category
      isCustom - true if user-defined, false if default

    • Category

      public Category(String name, boolean isCustom, String iconUrl)
      Constructs a new Category with a specific name and icon.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the category
      isCustom - true if user-defined, false if default
      iconUrl - the URL or path to the category icon
